response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has a diverse and extensive background in software development, with notable experience in geospatial projects (e.g., GISCollective) and performance-critical systems. However, his recent work lacks deep focus on C++/Rust or distributed systems for routing/navigation pipelines, which are core to this role. His strengths in geospatial data and full-stack development are relevant, but the role's technical demands may require more targeted experience.
strengths: Strong geospatial experience via GISCollective and Green Map, demonstrating hands-on work with geo-data platforms.
Proven ability to build scalable, event-driven systems (e.g., data integration at Sociomantic, open-source projects).
Diverse technical toolkit (C++, Dlang, Node.js) and commitment to testing/TDD, indicating adaptability and rigor.
concerns: Limited recent experience with C++ (primary language for the role) or Rust, with more focus on TypeScript/Node.js.
No explicit mention of routing/navigation systems or distributed data pipelines in recent roles.
Geospatial work appears more web/mobile-focused (e.g., Ember.js) rather than low-latency tiling pipelines.
